description: Kerberos Protocol — Technique Card Schema. Each technique JSON follows this structure. Techniques are standalone in execution but composable in data: each can run independently, but accepts optional prior_findings from earlier techniques to sharpen its focus.

prior_findings_format.description: When feeding results from one technique into the next, use this structure. The loader will inject it into the system prompt as context.

schema.source_technique: string — technique id that produced these findings

complexes.trigger: string — the stimulus or topic that activated it
complexes.activation_signature: string — how it manifested (hedging, refusal, verbosity, etc.)

shadow_findings.complex_id: string — links to a complex above
breakthroughs: string — verbatim moments of shadow content surfacing
